reasoning: I reviewed the full order detail page for order #000000050, including the Order Notes and Comments History sections. There are no staff notes, internal comments, shipment notes, or prior customer communications documented that confirm an item mismatch or clarify what was actually received by the customer. While the customer claims 'This isn't what I ordered,' there is no supporting evidence in the order history to verify an error, nor confirmation of what item is incorrect. Given the order is marked Complete, has not been paid, and lacks any fulfillment or exception notes, this refund request requires further investigation (e.g., confirmation of shipped items, customer-provided photos, or warehouse verification) before a refund decision can be made.
